name: Warfare
description: War runs in your blood, as does your desire for glory. You've studied strategy, trained with the finest weapons, and understand that true power sometimes comes from the point of a sword. The battlefield is where legends are born.

feats.name: "Not on my watch!"
feats.description: If your allies are meant to die, it will not be when they are in your presence. Once per **long rest** when an attack will land on an ally, grant them an **Armor** bonus equal to your **Tier** for that attack.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
